verdict.summary: The prior major finding is resolved. `_cmd_record` now fails closed on both invalid sides of the provider/class invariant: fleet records are limited to the folded zero-dispatch classes or success, and real providers cannot submit a folded zero-dispatch signal. Account sentinel selection now follows the validated fleet provider rather than the raw class. The self-test is non-vacuous: invalid pairings must return nonzero without incrementing the ledger writer, while fleet zero-dispatch, claim-abort, and success must each write exactly once. The workflow changes consistently move catalog/provider-derived strings from shell-source interpolation into environment variables and quote their expansions. No reviewer-directed instruction was found in the diff.
